    I

    ICE_CREAM_CONE - Enum constant in enum class logic.MenuType
    Enum constant for menu type.
    ICE_CREAM_SANDWICH - Enum constant in enum class logic.MenuType
    Enum constant for menu type.
    ICE_CREAM_SET - Enum constant in enum class logic.MenuType
    Enum constant for menu type.
    IceCreamable - Interface in entity
    Interface for ingredient that can be used as an ice cream holder which can be interacted with using Ice Cream Machine.
    IceCreamCone - Class in logic.menus
    Represents the ice cream cone menu item.
    IceCreamCone() - Constructor for class logic.menus.IceCreamCone
    Constructs a random Ice Cream Cone menu.
    IceCreamCone(IceCreamFlavor) - Constructor for class logic.menus.IceCreamCone
    Constructs an Ice Cream Cone menu with a specific flavor.
    iceCreamConeFlavor - Variable in class logic.menus.IceCreamSet
    The flavor for the ice cream cone in the set.
    iceCreamFlavor - Variable in class entity.ingredients.Cone
    The flavor of ice cream in the cone, if any.
    iceCreamFlavor - Variable in class entity.ingredients.SlicedBread
    The flavor of ice cream added to the sliced bread, if any.
    IceCreamFlavor - Enum Class in entity
    Enum class for all possible ice cream flavor including no flavor.
    IceCreamFlavor(String) - Constructor for enum class entity.IceCreamFlavor
    Constructs an IceCreamFlavor with its display text.
    IceCreamMachine - Class in logic.counters
    Counter for making ice cream.
    IceCreamMachine(double, double, double, double, IceCreamFlavor) - Constructor for class logic.counters.IceCreamMachine
    Constructs an Ice Cream Machine.
    IceCreamSandwich - Class in logic.menus
    Represents the ice cream sandwich menu item.
    IceCreamSandwich() - Constructor for class logic.menus.IceCreamSandwich
    Constructs a random Ice Cream Sandwich menu.
    IceCreamSandwich(IceCreamFlavor) - Constructor for class logic.menus.IceCreamSandwich
    Constructs an Ice Cream Sandwich menu with a specific flavor.
    iceCreamSandwichFlavor - Variable in class logic.menus.IceCreamSet
    The flavor for the ice cream sandwich in the set.
    IceCreamSet - Class in logic.menus
    Represents the ice cream set menu item.
    IceCreamSet() - Constructor for class logic.menus.IceCreamSet
    Constructs an Ice Cream Set with random flavors.
    IceCreamSet(IceCreamFlavor, IceCreamFlavor) - Constructor for class logic.menus.IceCreamSet
    Constructs an Ice Cream Set with specific flavors.
    imageURL - Variable in class entity.base.BaseItem
    The URL path for the item's image representation.
    increaseIngredientInStock(ItemSpriteType, int) - Method in class logic.GameInstance
    Increasing the amount of item specified by itemType parameter in the stock according to amount parameter.
    increasePlayerCash(int) - Method in class logic.GameInstance
    Increase player's cash by a specific amount.
    indefiniteTimeline - Variable in class sprites.AnimatedSprite
    An indefinite timeline for continuous looping animations.
    ingredientList - Static variable in class logic.menus.Sandwich
    The list of ingredients required to assemble a sandwich.
    ingredientOrder - Variable in class logic.GameInstance
    List of all ingredients player ordered from PC shop.
    ingredientOrder - Variable in class logic.menus.Sandwich
    The required order of ingredients for the sandwich.
    ingredientOrders - Variable in class gui.GameScene
    A map tracking ingredient orders to their respective UI labels.
    ingredientOrderUI - Variable in class gui.GameScene
    The UI container for ingredient order tracking.
    ingredientStock - Variable in class logic.GameInstance
    Map of stock of all basic ingredients.

    Checks if the given coordinates are within the bounding box.

    item - Variable in class sprites.ItemSprite
    The item logical object associated with this sprite.
    items - Variable in class logic.counters.BaseCounter
    The list of items currently placed on this counter.
    ItemSprite - Class in sprites
    Represents an item sprite.
    ItemSprite(ItemSpriteType) - Constructor for class sprites.ItemSprite
    Create an item sprite which player can interact with on the screen.
    ItemSpriteType - Enum Class in logic
    Represents the types of item sprites.

    Constructs an ItemSpriteType with display text and sale price.
